patches.hypothesis: The patch introduces unnecessary redundancy and incorrect logic in the scalar value handling and END_OBJECT sections. The refined patch removes the redundant check and corrects the END_OBJECT handling to ensure it works generally, not just for specific test cases.
patches.original_hypothesis: The issue seems to be related to incorrect handling of the END_OBJECT token when filtering. Specifically, the method might be returning null instead of the END_OBJECT token under certain conditions.
